label: ISSCC 2020 Paper 33.2 RRAM macro

device_variation_pct.note: MNSIM-compatible baseline comparator, not chip-measured HRS/LRS asymmetry.

saf_pct.note: No paper-backed SAF pair registered for this chip.

note: Unified literature-anchor profile. Feed this object into baseline and pim_sim translators instead of ad-hoc per-script assumptions.

current_dependent_energy_scale.note: Applied only to current-dependent ADC/xbar energy when available.

extra_output_buffer_kb.note: Macro-boundary output buffer overlay from published block diagram when available.

pimsim_overlay.note: Chip-specific ppa profile for Q. Liu ISSCC 2020 33.2. The baseline already uses MNSIM's dedicated Qi Liu ADC implementation via ADC_Choice=9 and a paper-backed Device_Resistance pair. The additional pim_sim correction is limited to two public-data-backed effects: a 4KB output-buffer macro-boundary area overlay from Fig. 33.2.2 and a 1.9x SW-2T2R current-suppression correction applied only to current-dependent ADC/xbar energy.

state_cv_pct.note: Paper does not provide a registered asymmetric HRS/LRS CV pair.
